name: Tolantongo Team
bio: We are the editorial team at Grutas de Tolantongo. With over 10 years of experience welcoming visitors to the Tolantongo Canyon in Cardonal, Hidalgo, we know every corner of this one-of-a-kind thermal destination in Mexico. Our guides are based on firsthand experience, verified data, and constant feedback from the thousands of travelers who visit us each year. We are passionate about sharing the natural and cultural richness of Hidalgo's Sierra Gorda.
